allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['result']; print\('errMsg:', r.get\('errorMessage'\)\); print\('total', r.get\('numberComponentsTotal'\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['result']; print\('status',r['status'],'errors',r['numberComponentErrors'],'deployed',r['numberComponentsDeployed'],'total',r['numberComponentsTotal']\); print\('errMsg', r.get\('errorMessage'\)\); [print\('FAIL',f['fullName'],f.get\('problem',''\)\) for f in \(r['details'].get\('componentFailures'\) or []\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d['result']; print\('status',r['status'],'err',r.get\('errorMessage'\)\); [print\('FAIL',f['fullName'],f.get\('problem',''\)\) for f in \(r['details'].get\('componentFailures'\) or []\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('result',{}\); [print\(f['fullName'], '|', f.get\('error'\),'| line', f.get\('lineNumber'\), 'col', f.get\('columnNumber'\)\) for f in r.get\('details',{}\).get\('componentFailures',[]\)]")
